title: Kiss the Boys Goodbye
writer: Clare Boothe Luce, Dwight Taylor, Harry Tugend
actors: Don Ameche, Mary Martin, Oscar Levant
plot: Broadway director Lloyd Lloyd (Don Ameche) and composer Dick Rayburn (Oscar Levant) search for talent down South and discover singer Cindy Lou Bethany (Mary Martin) who surprises them with her voice and striptease.
